data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md contains re-invocation guard documentation (grep: 're-invocation guard')
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents the REPLAN_ESCALATE signal and when it is emitted
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references the replan-escalate-signal contract doc location
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents the cascade protocol (brainstorm → preplanning → implementation-plan)
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents the sprint.max_replan_cycles config key, file, and default value
- [ ] RED test (test-claude-md-replan-safety.sh) passes GREEN after changes
- [ ] Shim check passes for CLAUDE.md
- [ ] Portability check passes for CLAUDE.md
